xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:AddressOfRegisteredOfficeOfCom: NTPC Bhawan, Core-7, SCOPE Complex, 7, Institutional Area, Lodi Road, New Delhi – 110003
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:AddressOfCorporateOfficeOfComp: NTPC Green Energy Limited, Renewable Building Netra Complex, E-3, Udyog Vihar Ph.-II, Greater Noida, UP-201306
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:NameOfContactPerson: Mr. Manish Kumar (Company Secretary & Compliance Officer)
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:RemarksForAssuranceOfTheEntity: Yes, NGEL has robust system in place to avoid/ manage conflict of interests involving members of the Board.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:ABriefOnTypesOfCustomersExplan: NGEL supplies electricity to various bulk customers located throughout the country. Our customers include • State owned electricity utilities like state electricity distribution companies, State Power entities • SECI • Western Central Railway
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:NameOfTheHoldingOrSubsidiaryAs: Indianoil NTPC Green Energy Private Limited
MAHAGENCO NTPC Green Energy Private Limited
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:RemarksStakeHolderGroupFromWho: Grievances are received on email and resolved through communication/consultation
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:RationaleForIdentifyingTheRisk: Climate change is posing both physical and transition risks to all business entities including NGEL. The risks associated with the increase in sea levels, water stress situations, increased heat waves, erratic rainfall and frequent natural disasters may impact the CUF of Solar and Wind Projects subsequently, the business. Rising climate change concerns and threats may bring future policy and regulatory risks in terms of carbon tax and cess.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:InCaseOfRiskApproachToAdaptOrM: NGEL is diversifying its business portfolio in Green Hydrogen, Energy storage systems, Consultancy. As part of NGEL’s preparedness against climate change related situations our power plants and infrastructure are designed to withstand adverse climatic conditions.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:RationaleForIdentifyingTheRisk: Water is an essential resource and water scarcity can significantly impact the operations of NGEL
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:InCaseOfRiskApproachToAdaptOrM: To reduce dependence and usage of water, NGEL is deploying robotic cleaning in the solar power plants.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:RationaleForIdentifyingTheRisk: With a large workforce involved in both operating stations as well as projects under construction, safety of people and property remains a potential risk.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:InCaseOfRiskApproachToAdaptOrM: To embed safety in all systems and processes, Safety policy has been revised and “SAP integrated Safety Framework” has been implemented across the organization to mitigate risks and eliminate hazards.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:RationaleForIdentifyingTheRisk: The dynamic business landscape is being driven through Digitalization. In this highly competitive era, digitalization is enabling faster decision making, reducing costs through automation and rendering long term competitive advantage.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:InCaseOfRiskApproachToAdaptOrM: NGEL is in the process of digitalization of sustainability governance procedures by enabling accurate, real-time tracking and reporting of ESG metrics, in line with evolving regulatory requirements and global best practices.

xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:NameOfTheNationalAndInternatio: E- waste management rules 2022 as notified by Ministry of Environment , Forest and Climate change
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:SpecificCommitmentsGoalsAndTar: Zero cases of adverse business ethics.
At NGEL we are committed to zero fatality
At NGEL we are committed to zero fatality
Generating Green Energy of 60 GW by 2032
Committed to provide equal opportunity, employment and creating workplace with respect and dignity
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:PerformanceOfTheEntityAgainstT: No breach of security and data privacy
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:StatementByDirectorResponsible: The statement of CMD can be found at page no. 7 of our Annual Report 2024-25.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfTheHighestAuthorityRe: DIN Number 00307037 Name Gurdeep Singh Designation Chairman & Managing Director Telephone No 011-24360044 Email ID cmd@ntpc.co.in
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfSpecifiedCommitteeOfT:
we have the Board level Corporate Social Responsibility Committee along with Risk Management Committee.
The detailed structure can be found at https://www.ngel.in/ngel-home
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:NotesManagementAndProcessDiscl: For Point 11., The question is not applicable to the NGEL as all the NGRBC principles are covered under our policies.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:AntiCorruptionOrAntiBriberyPol: NGEL has an Anti-Bribery and Anit Corruption (ABAC) policy in place to ensure its business is conducted in accordance with the highest ethical standards. The same can be accessed through https://www.ngel.in/public/media_library/1/905e9e51f9.pdf
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfAnyCorrectiveActionTa: No corrective action was taken as no such issues were identified.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfTheEntityHaveProcesse: Yes, NGEL has robust system in place to avoid/ manage conflict of interests involving members of the Board.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DescribeTheProcessesInPlaceToS: Via authorized recyclers/ dismantlers endorsed by CPCB/ SBCB
Bio- Medical Waste; Reclaiming Process: By approved agencies authorized by SPCB
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfMechanismAvailableToR: for addressing the grievances of employees, NGEL has a time bound Grievance Redressal Mechanism for all employees at each project. The employee grievances are also captured through different forums like participative forums, communication meetings, etc.

for addressing the grievances of employees, NGEL has a time bound Grievance Redressal Mechanism for all employees at each project. The employee grievances are also captured through different forums like participative forums, communication meetings, etc.

for addressing the grievances of employees, NGEL has a time bound Grievance Redressal Mechanism for all employees at each project. The employee grievances are also captured through different forums like participative forums, communication meetings, etc.

for addressing the grievances of employees, NGEL has a time bound Grievance Redressal Mechanism for all employees at each project. The employee grievances are also captured through different forums like participative forums, communication meetings, etc.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfOccupationalHealthAnd: NGEL prioritizes the safety, health, and well-being of its employees and contractors as a core value that guides all operations. We have implemented a comprehensive set of procedures, safety rules, and internationally recognized safety management systems across all our plants and locations. Adherence to these measures is mandatory for all employees and contractors, aiming for a workplace with zero incidents.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DesclosureOfTheProcessesUsedTo: In accordance with our safety principles, we have in place a comprehensive and centralized Hazard Identification, Risk Assessment and Control (HIRAC) document. The hierarchy of controls of hazards followed in preparing this document is elimination of hazard, substitution of hazard, engineering controls, administrative controls and PPEs in respective order.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DescribeTheMeasuresTakenByTheE: Safety audit of project/station is carried out on sample basis and audit of six project/station has been done in the FY 2024-25, Before starting a job, a Job Safety Analysis (JSA) is performed to identify hazards and mitigation measures. The area engineer or supervisor delivers toolbox talks to workers, highlighting safety points mentioned in the JSA. Periodic mass pep talks on general safety topics are conducted to create awareness and reinforce safety practices among workers.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfAnyCorrectiveActionTa: NGEL regularly monitors and engages to improve its working condition, and has developed Hazard Identification, Risk Assessment, and Control (HIRAC) documents for its Project/stations.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfMeasuresUndertakenByT: We collect TDS from all our vendors to ensure the submission of the applicable taxes. In addition to this we also have clauses in our GCC to ensure that all the statutory dues and fines are collected as applicable.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfAnyCorrectiveActionTa: Appropriate action has been taken against the contractors/ agencies who have been found guilty in cases of safety violations as per the policy.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DescribeTheProcessesForIdentif: Stakeholder engagement is a continuous process, encompassing interactions at various management levels and through diverse communication channels. To ensure the identification of key stakeholders, NGEL has devised a detailed stakeholder engagement framework.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:ProvideTheProcessesForConsulta: Yes, we have the Risk Management Committee and Corporate Social Responsibility Committee that meet regularly to discuss the ESG issues.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfInstancesAsToHowTheIn: NGEL recognizes the importance of conducting stakeholder consultation and hence we regularly interacts with our stakeholders, which enables us to gain understanding of the relative importance of specific environmental, social, and economic issues and their potential impact on value creation. We have adopted a structured methodology for conducting stakeholder consultation.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfInstancesOfEngagement: We regularly engage with the vulnerable/ marginalized stakeholder groups and conduct meetings and subsequently provide clarifications and address their concerns.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfOtherChannelsOfCommun: • Participative forums • Communication meetings • Employee surveys • Intranet and website • Training and workshops • Internal magazines
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfOtherFrequencyOfEngag: • Defined frequency of concerned Fora • Need based
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:PurposeAndScopeOfEngagementInc: • Professional growth • Work life balance • Health, safety and security • Timely resolution of grievances • Transparent appraisal and promotion cycle
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfOtherChannelsOfCommun: • Regional Customer meets. • Regional Power Committees (RPCs) • Commercial meetings/interactions • Customer Support services
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:PurposeAndScopeOfEngagementInc: • Resolving Commercial issues • Resolving Technical issues
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfOtherChannelsOfCommun: 1. Analyst and investor meeting 2. Annual general meeting 3. Review meets with bankers
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:PurposeAndScopeOfEngagementInc: 1. Improving Return on Investment 2. Responses to Climate change & Business sustainability 3. Risk and governance compliance 4. Increased disclosure on Environment, Social and Governance (ESG) aspects
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfOtherFrequencyOfEngag: Need basis • As per statutory requirement
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfOtherChannelsOfCommun: EMAIL, WEBSITE, PHONE CALLS, ONLINE TEAMS MEETING
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfOtherFrequencyOfEngag: Weekly, monthly through varous review meetings and on need basis
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:PurposeAndScopeOfEngagementInc:
Before tendering -Pre Bid Conference -NTPC/ NGEL WEBSITE -Need basis Post award contract review meeting, weekly review meeting
KEY TOPICS • Transparent process • Timely payment • Fair Opportunity • Sustainable supply chain
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DescribeTheInternalMechanismsI: We have established institutional mechanisms for grievance redressal, demonstrating our commitment to resolving stakeholder concerns in a timely and fair manner. To safeguard human rights, all significant investment agreements and contracts include clauses that minimize the risk of violations. We conduct regular monitoring to ensure compliance with regulations and internal policies.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:MechanismsToPreventAdverseCons: NGEL has formed the Internal Complaints Committees at our operational locations where complaints against sexual harassment can be registered.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfAnyCorrectiveActionsT: No cases Found, hence not applicable.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfABusinessProcessBeing: Appropriate systems and mechanisms with time bound process for redressal, such as grievance Management System, Internal Complaints Committee, Whistle-blower Policy etc. are in place to allow for resolution of the issues raised under this policy.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfTheScopeAndCoverageOf: We have provided the training related to Human Rights internally but we will conduct human right due diligence comprehensively in order to understand it holistically.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfAnyCorrectiveActionsT: No action was taken since no case were registered.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfProjectRelatedToReduc: In line with India ’s target to meet India’s Climate Change (NDC) commitments of emission reduction, the Company has taken various initiatives such as 1) Supporting low carbon economy. 2) Providing low carbon energy and decarbonizing the grid. 3) Focus on CO2 emission reduction. 4) Matching the load curve through hybrid (solar +wind) power plant.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:NameOfTheExternalAgencyThatUnd: Assurance has been carried out by M/s Bureau Veritas
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfWasteManagementPracti: We are dedicated to handling and disposing of all waste generated on our premises in an environmentally friendly, socially responsible, and commercially viable manner. Our comprehensive waste management approach includes collection, segregation, transportation, processing, recycling, and disposal of different types of waste. Our primary goal is to maximize resource utilization, minimizing the waste that must be disposed of. However, when disposal is necessary, we ensure full compliance with rules and regulatory requirements. Managing hazardous and non-hazardous waste generated by our power plants is governed by regulations.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfSignificantDirectAndI: We have installed Bird diverters to play a crucial role in protecting Great Indian Bustards (GIBs) in their habitat, primarily by reducing collisions with power lines. These diverters act as visual markers, making power lines more visible to GIBs, allowing them to avoid collisions and reduce mortality caused by power lines.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DisclosureWebLinkOfEntityAtWhi: All NGEL Project/stations have Disaster Management plans in place. And they have tie ups with local district administration offices, including fire departments, for any emergency.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DiscloseAnySignificantAdverseI: Waste generation from Packaging materials, Cable drums and electrical cable waste during project execution phase. All types of scrap materials are being disposed through Government approved recycling agencies only.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:WebLinkForDetailsOfInitiativeT: Robotic dry cleaning is employed fully at Devikot, Bhensada Power plants and partially at SKB-1, SKB-2, Ayodhya
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:OutcomeOfTheInitiative: Module efficiency improvement, Saving of water resource in desert areas
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:InitiativeUndertaken: Drone Thermography of Solar module arrays
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:WebLinkForDetailsOfInitiativeT: Deployed Drone based thermography in power plants to identify potential losses in DC power, thereby
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:InitiativeUndertaken: Scrap disposal through Government approved Recyclers
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:WebLinkForDetailsOfInitiativeT: All types of scrap materials is being disposed through Government approved recycling agencies
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:InitiativeUndertaken: Use High efficiency Solar PV Bifacial modules
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:WebLinkForDetailsOfInitiativeT: All our new power plants use High efficiency Bifacial solar PV modules for electricity generation
Recharge Pits have been constructed in power plant area order to recharge the ground water.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:OutcomeOfTheInitiative: Due to water recharge, water level is maintained in this area.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DescribeTheMechanismsToReceive: In order to facilitate resolution of grievances in transparent and time bound manner NTPC, the holding company has developed an interactive grievance redressal mechanism which can be accessed through our website at https://www.ntpc.co.in/grievance In addition to this, grievances are also received through RTI, which are answered in a time-bound manner.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:CSRProject: Contribution of CSR budget amount is deposited as per the Schedule VII of Section 135 of Companies Act 2013
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfNegativeSocialImpactI: NA, SIA shall be conducted after 3 years of the completion of CSR Projects
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:CorrectiveActionTakenForNegati: NA, SIA shall be conducted after 3 years of the completion of CSR Projects
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:FromWhichMarginalizedOrVulnera: NGEL gives preference to Micro and Small Enterprises (MSEs) in various Procurements, as per the Government of India procurement policies for MSE.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DescribeTheMechanismsInPlaceTo: We regularly engage with our customers at different RPC forums, One to one meeting etc where we reach out to them and collect feedback/expectations.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:WebLinkOfThePolicyOnCyberSecur: NGEL, being a subsidiary of NTPC is following cyber security policy of NTPC available at https://ntpc.co.in/sites/default/files/policy-documents/CCIT-IMS-PLCY-CSP.pdf.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:WeblinkWhereInformationOnProdu: The information of our products and services can be found at our website https://www.ngel.in/
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:StepsTakenToInformAndEducateCo: We offer customer support in various areas, including health and safety through workshops and seminars, with safety instructions displayed in local languages.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:MechanismsInPlaceToInformConsu: NGEL has the Regional Power Committee (RPC) and Load Dispatch Centers (RLDCs and SLDCs) which ensure coordination within their respective regions.
